title: Site Activity Monitor
description: Signed-in account activity with IP, names, and action type. Anonymous viewers are not named.

title: Financial Transactions
description: All platform sales, escrow, refunds, and payment events — no personal emails shown.

title: Message Monitor
description: On-platform buyer–seller messages. Blocks email, phone, and off-platform contact.

title: Privacy & On-Platform Rules
description: How contact info is blocked and why profiles hide personal data.

title: Contact Inbox
description: Public contact form submissions — operator eyes only.

title: Dropshipping AI Store Builder
description: Full AI dropship wizard embedded in the operator console.

title: AI Store Builder
description: SEO, listing templates, and search-engine pack — embedded here.

title: Add Product
description: List a new collectible with name, category, and COA details.

title: Catalog Editor
description: Edit featured listings and showcase product data.

title: Tax Reserve Calculator
description: Set aside 25% of each sale for Louisiana business income tax.

title: Shipping Tax Calculator
description: Sales tax from the buyer shipping zip (Louisiana Marketplace Facilitator Act 22).

title: Wholesale Transfer Tracker
description: Log instant wholesale transfers to distributor fulfillment nodes.

title: Forced Refund Control
description: Look up orders, dry-run, and issue full Stripe refunds. Freeze sellers when at fault.

title: COA Manager
description: Issue and verify floor office COA serials (FS-YYYY-NNNNNN).

title: Refund & Counterfeit Review
description: Select a case to review reports, approve forced refunds, freezes, and COA revocations.

title: eBay CSV Import
description: Import listings from eBay Seller Hub export files.

title: Social Ads Copy
description: X, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and Telegram ad copy for campaigns.

title: Rebuild Site
description: Run the Franks Standard build pipeline (generate + SEO + IndexNow).
